Wallpaper Calculator

Calculate how many rolls of wallpaper you need. Enter your room dimensions and roll specifications for an accurate estimate.

FAQ

How do I calculate wallpaper needed?

Measure wall area (perimeter × height), subtract openings, then divide by the usable area per roll (considering pattern repeat waste).

What is pattern repeat?

Pattern repeat is the distance between identical points in the wallpaper design. Larger repeats mean more waste when matching patterns.

What is a standard wallpaper roll size?

US standard: 27" wide × 27 ft long (≈57 sq ft). European standard: 53cm wide × 10m long (≈5.3 sq m).
